vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely non-representative of the current visual data. P1 (String of Nickels) is absent or entirely subterranean. P2/P4 (Mexican Mint/Silver Guest) are not visible as distinct specimens. P3 (Pothos) is present but severely compromised.

plant_audit.P1: Yellow pot contains only dark, damp substrate. No signs of succulent growth.
plant_audit.P2: Black pot contains only dark, damp substrate. No signs of mint growth.
plant_audit.P3: Black pot contains a small, white rabbit figurine (scale anchor) and minimal, possibly necrotic, plant matter.
plant_audit.P4: Not identifiable as a distinct entity; likely merged into the soil of P2 or lost.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark and saturated across all pots; potential for anaerobic conditions.
biome_observations.debris: Presence of white, fragmented material (likely eggshells or perlite) in P3.
biome_observations.surface_anomalies: No active growth or moss; surface appears stagnant.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t4: Initial state shows minimal structure; T-3 introduces a metallic object (spoon) near P1, suggesting human intervention.
temporal_deltas.t3_to_current: The spoon is removed; the substrate remains unchanged. No vegetative recovery observed.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of critical failure. The lack of visible chlorophyll-bearing tissue in P1, P2, and P4 indicates total specimen loss. P3 is the only pot showing physical remnants, but it lacks signs of active vitality.
anomalies: Introduction of a metal spoon (T-3) followed by its removal.
Presence of white, calcified-looking fragments in P3.
Total absence of expected foliage across 75% of the registry.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a botanical environment that has undergone a catastrophic decline. The pots are currently functioning as containers for inert, damp soil rather than living specimens. The intervention at T-3 (spoon placement) did not result in any observable improvement or change in the biological status of the plants. The environment is currently devoid of healthy plant life.
